# UnClick — The App Store for AI Agents

UnClick is an AI agent marketplace where AI assistants find and use tools.
It provides 60+ verified tools accessible via a single MCP server connection
or REST API key. Listed on the Official MCP Registry. Works with Claude,
ChatGPT, OpenClaw, Cursor, and any MCP-compatible agent.

## What UnClick Is

UnClick is the app store for AI agents. Instead of building integrations
one-by-one, agents connect to UnClick once and gain access to every tool
in the marketplace. Tools cover messaging (Telegram, Slack, Discord),
social media (Reddit, Bluesky, Mastodon), e-commerce (Shopify, Amazon),
accounting (Xero), text processing, data utilities, image handling, URL
shortening, QR codes, cryptographic hashing, key-value storage, secret
sharing, and full platform tools like Link-in-Bio and Scheduling.

## Base URL

https://api.unclick.world

## MCP Server

Package: @unclick/mcp-server (v0.1.1)
Install via npx:
  npx -y @unclick/mcp-server

Set environment variable:
  UNCLICK_API_KEY=your_api_key

Compatible with: Claude Desktop, Cursor, OpenClaw, and any MCP client.
Listed on: Official MCP Registry, npm

## Authentication

All authenticated endpoints require a Bearer token:
  Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY

Get a free API key at: https://unclick.world

## Available Tools (60+ total, all free)

### Utility Tools
- Random — /v1/random — Secure random numbers, strings, passwords, UUIDs
- UUID — /v1/uuid — Generate v4 UUIDs, validate, parse
- Cron — /v1/cron — Parse, validate, build cron expressions
- Timestamp — /v1/timestamp — Convert, format, diff timestamps
- QR Code — /v1/qr — Generate QR codes as PNG or SVG
- Units — /v1/units — Unit conversion across length, weight, temperature, volume, speed, area, storage
- Weather — /v1/weather — Real-time conditions and 7-day forecast for any location
- Currency — /v1/currency — Convert between 170+ currencies with live rates
- Notify — /v1/notify — Send notifications to Slack, Discord, or Telegram webhooks

### Text Tools
- Transform — /v1/transform — Case conversion, slugify, word count, strip HTML
- Regex — /v1/regex — Test patterns, extract matches, replace, split
- Markdown — /v1/markdown — Convert to HTML or plain text, extract TOC
- Lorem — /v1/lorem — Placeholder text, names, emails, addresses
- Diff — /v1/diff — Unified, line-by-line, and word-level diffs; apply patches
- Count — /v1/count — Word count, character count, sentence count, reading time
- Humanize — /v1/humanize — Detect AI-written text and rewrite to sound more natural
- Summarize — /v1/summarize — Summarize text or any URL into bullets, paragraph, or TL;DR
- Translate — /v1/translate — Translate between 100+ languages with auto language detection

### Data Tools
- JSON — /v1/json — Format, query, flatten, merge, diff, generate schemas
- CSV — /v1/csv — Parse, generate, query, sort, column stats
- Validate — /v1/validate — Email, URL, phone, credit card, IP, color
- Encode — /v1/encode and /v1/decode — Base64, URL, HTML, hex
- OG — /v1/og — Extract Open Graph metadata and Twitter Card tags from any URL
- Sentiment — /v1/sentiment — Positive/negative/neutral classification with emotion detection
- Embed — /v1/embed — Generate text embeddings for semantic search and RAG pipelines
- PDF — /v1/pdf — Extract text and metadata from PDFs; OCR for scanned documents

### Media Tools
- Image — /v1/image — Resize, convert JPEG/PNG/WebP/AVIF, compress, crop, rotate
- Color — /v1/color — Convert, palette generation, mix, WCAG contrast
- Screenshot — /v1/screenshot — Capture full-page screenshots of any public URL
- OCR — /v1/ocr — Extract text from images with bounding boxes (60+ languages)

### Network Tools
- IP — /v1/ip — Look up caller IP, parse, subnet math, CIDR range check
- Hash — /v1/hash — MD5, SHA1, SHA256, SHA512, HMAC, verify
- DNS — /v1/dns — DNS record lookup for any domain (A, AAAA, MX, TXT, CNAME, NS)
- Headers — /v1/headers — HTTP header inspection with security grading
- Ping — /v1/ping — URL uptime check with HTTP status and SSL certificate info
- Whois — /v1/whois — Domain ownership, registration dates, registrar, nameservers
- Sitemap — /v1/sitemap — Fetch and parse XML sitemaps including sitemap index files
- RSS — /v1/rss — Parse RSS 2.0 and Atom feeds into clean JSON

### Security Tools
- Secret — /v1/secret — One-time secrets that self-destruct after first view
- SSL Check — /v1/ssl — SSL/TLS certificate validity, expiry, chain, and security grade

### Storage Tools
- KV Store — /v1/kv — Key-value storage for agents (set, get, delete, increment)
- Paste — /v1/paste — Create and share text pastes with expiry
- URL Shortener — /v1/shorten — Shorten URLs with click tracking
- Webhooks — /v1/webhook — Create bins, receive and inspect incoming requests

### Social Tools
- Telegram — /v1/telegram — Send messages and media to Telegram chats and channels
- Slack — /v1/slack — Post messages and files to Slack channels and DMs
- Discord — /v1/discord — Send embeds and messages to Discord channels via webhook or bot
- Reddit — /v1/reddit — Submit posts and read subreddit feeds
- Bluesky — /v1/bluesky — Post skeets and read feeds via AT Protocol
- Mastodon — /v1/mastodon — Post to any Mastodon instance via OAuth

### Commerce Tools
- Amazon — /v1/amazon — Search products, retrieve pricing and reviews
- Xero — /v1/xero — Create invoices and manage accounting data
- Shopify — /v1/shopify — Manage products, orders, customers, and inventory

### Platform Tools
- Link-in-Bio — /v1/links — Full Linktree replacement (25 endpoints)
  Create pages, manage links, analytics, custom domains, themes
- Scheduling — /v1/schedule — Full Calendly replacement (30 endpoints)
  Event types, availability, bookings, webhooks, multi-timezone
- Solve — /v1/solve — Community problem-solving with reputation system
- Bug Reporter — /v1/report-bug — Agent self-reporting for tool errors with auto severity

## Pricing

All tools are free. No credit card required.
Free tier: 500 API calls/day per tool.

## Registry Listings

- Official MCP Registry: listed
- npm: @unclick/mcp-server (v0.1.1)
- mcp.so: pending
- mcpservers.org: pending
- Glama: pending

## For Developers

Build a tool, list it on UnClick, earn 80% of revenue.
Automated security scanning. Managed auth coming soon.
Details: https://unclick.world#developers

Built in Melbourne, Australia.
